description: A letter from one of the leaders of Aleppo to 'our master the Nagid', probably Yiṣḥaq Sholal. He explains that he is trying to raise money to ransom captives, but finds it difficult to persuade the communities to assist. (Info from A. David via FGP)
description_he: מכתב בעברית מ-Aleppo. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
